errors.name: AccountAlreadyInUse
errors.msg: an account with the same address already exists

errors.name: ResultWithNegativeLamports
errors.msg: account does not have enough SOL to perform the operation

errors.name: InvalidProgramId
errors.msg: cannot assign account to this program id

errors.name: InvalidAccountDataLength
errors.msg: cannot allocate account data of this length

errors.name: MaxSeedLengthExceeded
errors.msg: length of requested seed is too long

errors.name: AddressWithSeedMismatch
errors.msg: provided address does not match addressed derived from seed

errors.name: NonceNoRecentBlockhashes
errors.msg: advancing stored nonce requires a populated RecentBlockhashes sysvar

errors.name: NonceBlockhashNotExpired
errors.msg: stored nonce is still in recent_blockhashes

errors.name: NonceUnexpectedBlockhashValue
errors.msg: specified nonce does not match stored nonce
